title: paeonia × suffruticosa subsp. spontanea
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa subsp. spontanea, also known as the Chinese peony, is a perennial plant native to China and Korea, belonging to the Paeoniaceae family and being a cross between Paeonia lactiflora and Paeonia veitchii. Traditionally, the plant's roots and rhizomes have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia × suffruticosa subsp. spontanea include reducing pain and inflammation, treating menstrual disorders, and relieving anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant include dried root and rhizome extracts, teas, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate various health conditions.
